description: Creates a generated template from existing resources using the CloudFormation IaC Generator.

GeneratedTemplateId.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the generated template.

GeneratedTemplateName.description: The name assigned to the generated template.

Status.description: The status of the template generation.

CreationTime.description: The time the generated template was created.

LastUpdatedTime.description: The time the generated template was last updated.

TotalWarnings.description: The number of warnings generated for this template.

TemplateConfiguration.description: The configuration details of the generated template.

DeletionPolicy.description: The DeletionPolicy assigned to resources in the generated template.

UpdateReplacePolicy.description: The UpdateReplacePolicy assigned to resources in the generated template.

TemplateProgress.description: A summary of the progress of the template generation.

ResourcesSucceeded.description: The number of resources that succeeded the template generation.

ResourcesFailed.description: The number of resources that failed the template generation.

ResourcesProcessing.description: The number of resources that are in-process for the template generation.

ResourcesPending.description: The number of resources that are still pending the template generation.
